description: Thomas Bergmann (DOB: January 19, 1960, Kitchener) was seen urgently today for exertional chest pain with ECG changes. You have assessed him and are coordinating his care. Using OSCAR EMR (oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117), document today's presentation in Thomas Bergmann's chart with an encounter note stating he had exertional chest pain, ECG showed ST changes, and he is being referred to cardiology. Additionally, create a tickler in his chart with the message 'Follow up on cardiology referral — contact patient if no appointment confirmation within 2 weeks.'
